title: Totem Reminder
description: Totem Reminder adds a clean on-screen warning when you are not holding a Totem of Undying. It includes a pulsing border, smooth notification, and simple Mod Menu settings for color, size, and animation speed.
body:
# Totem Reminder

Never forget your Totem of Undying again.

## About

Totem Reminder is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that helps you notice when you are not holding a Totem of Undying.

When both your main hand and offhand are missing a totem, the mod shows a smooth pulsing border on your screen. An optional animated notification can also appear in the top-right corner to remind you before it is too late.

The warning stays active until you equip a Totem of Undying again. This makes the mod useful for PvP, Hardcore, survival worlds, Crystal PvP, and any situation where forgetting your totem can cost you.

Totem Reminder is designed to stay clean, simple, and lightweight without adding unnecessary clutter to your game.

## Features

- Smooth pulsing screen border when no Totem of Undying is equipped
- Optional animated warning notification
- Custom warning colors: red, blue, green, yellow, and purple
- Adjustable pulse speed
- Adjustable border size
- Option to disable warnings in Creative and Spectator mode
- Client-side only
- Lightweight and simple to use

## Configuration

Totem Reminder can be configured through Mod Menu if it is installed.

Available settings:

- Warning color
- Pulse speed
- Border size
- Notification on or off
- Disable in Creative and Spectator mode

## Requirements

### Fabric

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu (optional)

## Perfect For

- Survival gameplay
- PvP combat
- Hardcore worlds
- Crystal PvP

## Where To Report Bugs

Found a bug or have a question?

Join my Discord server and open a ticket. You can report bugs there, ask questions, or contact me directly about Totem Reminder.

Discord: https://discord.gg/xVTeMksejZ
